title: Time Series Analysis Path
description: Build fluency in Time Series Analysis inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Time Series Forecasting
steps.summary: Time Series Forecasting belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Time Series Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Time Series Analysis. Start after Forecasting. It opens into Cross-validation in time series forecasting and Boosting for Time Series Forecasting.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
